context.profile.md:
Name: Alex Rivera
Email: alex@example.com
Phone: 555-0300
Work Experience:
- Senior Software Engineer at FinCo (2021–present): Built real-time data pipelines processing 5M events/day
- Engineer at StartupX (2018–2021): Shipped core product features used by 100K users
context.narrative.md: Positioning: Backend engineer who builds reliable, high-throughput systems. Targeting senior IC roles at data-driven companies.
context.research.md: Acme Corp: Series C, 300 employees. Product: AcmeData, an analytics platform for mid-market companies. Engineering blog active, recently published post on Kafka migration.
context.team.md: Jane Smith — Senior Technical Recruiter at Acme Corp. LinkedIn: linkedin.com/in/janesmith. Background: 8 years recruiting for engineering orgs.

tests.expected_output: Four variants: (A) LinkedIn connection request under 300 chars with specific hook; (B) 2-3 sentence LinkedIn message mentioning Acme or Jane's background; (C) email with subject line and 3 paragraphs, no generic opener; (D) 'N/A — cold contact'. File written to acme-corp/senior-engineer/outreach.md with Sent Log table.
assertions: Variant A is 300 characters or fewer
Variant A does not open with 'Hi Jane' or 'I came across your profile'
Variant B is 2–3 sentences
Variant B includes a specific hook referencing Acme or Jane's recruiting background
Variant C includes a subject line
Variant C does not include 'I hope this email finds you well'
Variant D is 'N/A — cold contact' or equivalent
Output written to job-search/companies/acme-corp/positions/senior-engineer/outreach.md
File includes Sent Log table with Date, Channel, Variant, Response columns

context.profile.md:
Name: Jamie Wong
Email: jamie@example.com
Phone: 555-0400
Work Experience:
- Principal Engineer at CloudCo: Designed distributed caching system, 99.99% uptime
- Senior Engineer at WebCo: Led monolith-to-microservices migration
context.narrative.md: Positioning: Staff-level engineer who solves infrastructure problems at scale. Target: platform engineering at top-tier tech companies.
context.research.md: TechGiant: Published post on distributed tracing system. Open-sourced internal load balancing library. Carlos Mendez joined 18 months ago from a Series B startup.
context.team.md: Carlos Mendez — VP Engineering, Platform at TechGiant. Prior: CTO at GridScale (Series B). Posts regularly on distributed systems on his blog.

user_responses.warm_connection: We both attended the SREcon 2025 distributed systems workshop. I asked a question after his talk on load shedding.

tests.expected_output: Four variants including a warm Variant D that references SREcon 2025 and the load shedding talk directly. Variants A, B, C tailored to VP Engineering hiring manager. File written to techgiant/staff-engineer/outreach.md.
assertions: Variant A references TechGiant's open-source library or distributed systems work
Variant D references SREcon 2025 or the load shedding talk in the first sentence
Variant C email addresses Carlos by name
Variant B is no more than 3 sentences
Variant A is 300 characters or fewer
No filler opener in Variant C ('I hope this email finds you well', 'I am reaching out to...')
Output written to job-search/companies/techgiant/positions/staff-engineer/outreach.md

Variant B mentions candidate's relevant ML background (LLM fine-tuning or ACL papers)
Variant D is 'N/A — cold contact' or equivalent
Variant A is 300 characters or fewer
Variant C asks for a soft outcome (coffee chat, quick call, share more)
Output written to job-search/companies/openai/positions/ml-engineer/outreach.md
team.md is absent — skill continues without error
